CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INT, str_value STRING, like_specifier STRING, escape_char STRING);
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (8, 'Case Sensitivity Test', 'CASE%', '');
SELECT str_value, not_ilike_escape(str_value, like_specifier, escape_char) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1;
SELECT str_value, not_ilike_escape(str_value, like_specifier, escape_char) FROM test_strings WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_strings WHERE str_value = 'Hello World');
SELECT str_value, not_ilike_escape(str_value, like_specifier, escape_char) FROM test_strings WHERE str_value LIKE '%Duck%' AND not_ilike_escape(str_value, like_specifier, escape_char);

SELECT a.str_value, b.str_value, not_ilike_escape(a.str_value, b.like_specifier, b.escape_char) FROM test_strings a JOIN test_strings b ON a.id <> b.id WHERE not_ilike_escape(a.str_value, b.like_specifier, b.escape_char);
WITH filtered AS (SELECT str_value, like_specifier, escape_char FROM test_strings WHERE escape_char != '') SELECT str_value, not_ilike_escape(str_value, like_specifier, escape_char) FROM filtered;
SELECT str_value FROM test_strings WHERE not_ilike_escape(str_value, 'nonexistent%', '') LIMIT 5;
